action.query: best facial spas in Katy TX 2026

content.text:
Based on recent online reviews and ratings (as of 2026), here are some of the top-rated facial spas in Katy, TX. I've focused on places with strong customer feedback for facials specifically, drawing from sources like Yelp and TripAdvisor. Keep in mind that "best" is subjective and can depend on your specific needs (e.g., luxury treatments, medical-grade facials, or budget options). I recommend checking availability and reading recent reviews before booking.

### Top Recommendations:
- **Lisa Nguyen Facial Care**: This spot stands out with a 4.9-star rating from over 80 reviews, praised for personalized facials, skilled estheticians, and relaxing atmosphere. It's a great choice for customized skin care treatments like deep cleansing or anti-aging facials.[[1]](https://www.yelp.com/search?find_desc=Facial&find_loc=Katy%2C+TX)
- **SkinSpirit - Katy**: A medical spa with a 4.3-star rating, offering advanced facial treatments like hydrafacials and chemical peels. Reviewers highlight the professional staff and clean facilities, though it has fewer reviews overall.[[1]](https://www.yelp.com/search?find_desc=Facial&find_loc=Katy%2C+TX)
- **Spavia Cinco Ranch**: Known for luxury day spa experiences, including a variety of facials (e.g., signature or therapeutic options). It's highly rated for its serene environment and additional services like massages.[[2]](https://cincoranchtx.spaviadayspa.com/)
- **All Is Well Holistic Spa**: Tops TripAdvisor lists for wellness-focused facials and holistic treatments. Customers appreciate the calming vibe and natural approaches to skin care.[[3]](https://www.tripadvisor.com/Attractions-g56062-Activities-c40-Katy_Texas.html)
- **Anita's Skin Care Clinic**: Offers custom facials, dermaplaning, and peels with positive feedback on results and affordability. It's a solid pick for targeted skin concerns.[[4]](https://anitasskincareclinickaty.com/)

If you're looking for medical spas with more advanced tech (like laser treatments), check out Katy Med Tech Spa[[5]](https://katymedtechspa.com/?srsltid=AfmBOoqVdlMPkcpqrpVEr1m0KK2y7veRld4HP-aFeClpSUwq9NyZNCY6) or MedSpa At Villagio[[6]](https://medspaatvillagio.com/). For the latest deals or to compare, sites like Yelp or the spas' own websites are your best bet. If you provide more details (e.g., type of facial or budget), I can refine this!
